summary: TemaDom Iteration 21 - Bug fixes testing: Subscription prices verified (49/99/199 BGN), admin clean-test-data endpoint with key validation, logo visibility, navigation dropdown links, share buttons. All 21 backend tests passed. All frontend UI checks passed.
passed_tests: ✅ Plans include company section with starter, pro, premium
✅ Starter plan has limitations (Ограничен, Без AI)
✅ Pro plan has AI Builder feature with 1 variant limitation
✅ Premium plan has AI Designer 5 variants, AI Sketch, structural drawings
✅ AI Designer module: 29 лв/генерация with bundle prices
✅ POST /api/admin/clean-test-data with correct key returns success
✅ AI Gallery API returns projects list
✅ Logo fully visible in navbar (238px x 72px), not cropped
✅ Navigation dropdown 'Още' opens with all required links
✅ Dropdown contains: AI Дизайнер, AI Sketch, AI Галерия, Абонаменти
✅ Subscriptions page shows 3 plans with correct prices
✅ Pro: 99 лв/мес with ПРЕПОРЪЧАН badge, AI Builder 1 variant
✅ AI Designer module: 29 лв/генерация with bundle prices (69 лв / 99 лв)
✅ AI Gallery shows share buttons (Facebook, Viber, WhatsApp, Telegram, Copy Link)
✅ AI Sketch page loads with upload zones and building types
critical_code_review_comments: 1. Subscription prices updated: Starter 49 лв, Pro 99 лв, Premium 199 лв
2. Admin clean-test-data endpoint works with key validation (403 for wrong key)
3. Logo is fully visible in navbar left corner (238x72px)
4. Navigation dropdown 'Още' contains AI Дизайнер, AI Sketch, AI Галерия links
5. Share buttons on gallery: Facebook, Viber, WhatsApp, Telegram, Copy Link
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: TemaDom Iteration 21 fully tested. Bug fixes verified: 1) Subscription prices - Starter 49 лв/мес, Pro 99 лв/мес, Premium 199 лв/мес - PASS, 2) Admin clean-test-data with key temadom-clean-2026 - PASS, 3) Logo visibility 238x72px in navbar - PASS, 4) Navigation dropdown contains AI links - PASS, 5) Share buttons (Facebook, Viber, WhatsApp, Telegram, Copy Link) - PASS. AI Gallery has 1 project remaining after cleanup. DB was cleaned via admin endpoint.
